---
title: "Data Infrastructures Group"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
listing:
  id: sample-listings
  categories: false
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, title]
---

::: {#mission}
### We are an interdisciplinary group that uses computational and humanistic methods to:

-   investigate the ideological compoents of data infrastructures.

-   Do a second thing

-   And a third thing

### so that we can build humane technology or other thing.
:::

#### Lately

::: {#sample-listings}
:::
